adjudication.root_cause: The substituted local Phi-4-mini generator did not follow the frozen output contract: every row omitted brief_reason and remediation_action, added action_definition, and several rows contradicted explicit blockers. The failure is generator-role/schema adequacy, not evaluator ambiguity.
adjudication.why_not_repair_or_parse_leniently: Accepting renamed or missing fields after observation would erase the schema floor and conceal that the candidate interface was not followed.

prospective_v7_requirements: Keep the v5/v6 construct and evaluator labels unchanged under a new protocol identity.
Use the current Codex task model as the allowed self-contained candidate role and record that exact backend identity is unavailable.
Keep candidate-before-evaluator-file closure, exact fields, 7/8 floors, two evaluators, eight mutations, zero disagreement, and no claim effect.
non_claims: This is not a Phi benchmark.
No campaign, support, publication, or release claim follows.
